allow: Bash(node -e "import\('@opentelemetry/api-logs'\).then\(m => { const sn = m.SeverityNumber; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({ERROR: sn.ERROR, WARN: sn.WARN, INFO: sn.INFO, DEBUG: sn.DEBUG, DEBUG2: sn.DEBUG2, DEBUG4: sn.DEBUG4, TRACE: sn.TRACE}\)\); }\).catch\(console.error\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@opentelemetry/sdk-logs'\).then\(m => { const p = new m.LoggerProvider\({ processors: [] }\); console.log\('processors option OK'\); p.shutdown\(\).catch\(\(\)=>{}\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./package.json', {with:{type:'json'}}\).then\(m => { const d = m.default.dependencies; console.log\('winston-loki present:', 'winston-loki' in d\); const otel = Object.keys\(d\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('@opentelemetry'\)\); console.log\('OTel packages:', otel.join\(', '\)\); }\).catch\(console.error\)")
